title: DUX v9.5 Result Object
description: Measurable outcome from behavior change - tracks what happens when users adopt new behaviors

object_type.description: Object type discriminator - always 'Result' for Result objects

description.description: Clear description of the measurable outcome or behavior change

end_user.description: User personas or roles who experience this result

key_signals.description: Observable signals that indicate this result is being achieved

derived_from_behavior_signals.description: Whether this result's signals are derived from behavior signals

source_behavior_ids.description: Behavior IDs that contribute to this result

acceptance_criteria.description: Clear, testable criteria that define successful achievement of this result

evidence_status.description: System-derived evidence quality: evidence_backed (2+ evidence, 1+ quantitative), evidence_present (1+ evidence, may lack quantitative), assumptive (recommend phase or no supporting evidence)

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this result's importance and measurement approach

evidence_teaser.description: Brief insight hook for pain points, stats, or key findings

tags.description: System-derived tags generated by NotebookLM DUX scan - not manually set
